mapper.insert: insert into crawler_cron (user_id, crawler_name, trigger_state, target_source, key_word, params, frequency, alert_trigger, time_range, alert_method, dedup_enable, state, run_times, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{crawlerName}, 0, #{targetSource}, #{keyWord}, #{params}, #{frequency}, #{alertTrigger}, #{timeRange}, #{alertMethod}, #{dedupEnable}, 0, 0, now())

INSERT IGNORE INTO news_data_cron (crawler_id, title, content, publish_time, source, url, pic_url) VALUES
(#{item.crawlerId}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.publishTime}, #{item.source}, #{item.url}, #{item.picUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(publish_time) FROM news_data_cron WHERE crawler_id = #{crawlerId}
